## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe your idea. Be specific about files, scripts, or workflows affected. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about and why did you rule them out? -->

## Scope & risks

<!-- Is this fleet-wide or per-project? Any backwards-compatibility concerns? -->

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I'm willing to open a PR for this feature
- [ ] I need help scoping the implementation first

## Additional context
